tags.fixme: This relation should be extended to 贾河. [Check date: 2018-06-17]As I memorized, 城郊 Line trains continue their service to Line 2; the other trains (2/3) in Line 2 will be terminating at 南四环. All the trains in 城郊 Line terminates at 贾河 and 郑州航空港, not 南四环
